_comment: HOW TO ADD BUYERS: Add their email (lowercase) to the 'emails' array below. Then re-deploy to Cloudflare Pages. Emails are case-insensitive — they are lowercased before checking.
_instructions: 1. Buyer purchases → 2. Copy their email → 3. Add to array below → 4. git commit + push → 5. Cloudflare auto-redeploys in ~60 seconds
